# Fix Report - 2026-06-23 13:45

**Symptom:** On the storefront product page, the description does not match the admin panel. For Lattafa originals the PDP showed auto-generated nonsense ("A lattafa original composition, read top to base.", "Lattafa Perfumes meets the skin first and sets the room.", "The drydown rests on perfume.") instead of the real admin description.
**Mode:** frontend
**Outcome:** fixed

## Feedback Loop
- Initial: local dev render of `/products/9bf4682a-...` (Yara Candy) showed fabricated narrative, no admin description.
- Final: same page renders the full admin description verbatim; 0 occurrences of the fabricated narrative.

## Root Cause
- `src/components/storefront/ProductNotesStory.tsx:103-176` — the component ALWAYS rendered a fabricated "opening/heart/drydown" narrative woven from `topNotes/heartNotes/baseNotes` plus an italic `A {family} composition...` heading. For Lattafa originals the notes data is junk (brand/category/type → "Lattafa Perfumes", "lattafa original", "perfume"), so the woven prose read as nonsense.
- `src/app/products/[slug]/page.tsx:242` — a prior change passed `description={undefined}` for Lattafa products, hiding the real admin description entirely, so only the fabricated narrative remained.

## Patch
- Files changed: `src/components/storefront/ProductNotesStory.tsx`, `src/app/products/[slug]/page.tsx`
- Change summary:
  - Page now passes the real description for ALL products: `description={product.description ?? plainDescription}` (removed the Lattafa branch + unused `isLattafaProduct` import).
  - ProductNotesStory renders the real admin description verbatim (sanitized rich HTML) whenever one exists, and only falls back to the woven opening/heart/drydown narrative when there is NO description. The fabricated `familyLine` heading is likewise fallback-only.

## Verification
- `npm run type-check` - PASS
- `npm run build` - PASS
- local `curl /products/9bf4682a-...` - real description present, fabricated narrative absent (0 matches) - PASS

## Remaining Notes
- Products with no admin description still get the editorial opening/heart/drydown fallback (graceful, unchanged for them).
- This supersedes the earlier Req3 approach (hiding the description for Lattafa), which was the wrong interpretation of the client request.
